item.title: Showtime Website History
item.description: For now, this is a gitinfo tryout: (see https://gohugo.io/methods/page/gitinfo/) GitInfo: Gitinfo: AbbreviatedHash: a09c84a AuthorDate: 2026-07-20 AuthorEmail: zidanie.noudengmazamo@student.htw-berlin.de AuthorName: zid24 CommitDate: 2026-07-20 Hash: a09c84ab1d6d19972948836e3945789c94ddeb41 Subject: M3 Inhalt ExergameSnacks (#510)
